initial_program:
% 1. Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Output cell definition
output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Exactly one colour per output cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% 2. Copy all nonzero cells (including 5) but not zeros
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

% 3. Propagation rules (neighbourhood, 8direction)
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 0, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 0, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 1, C1 = C,     output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 1, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 1, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.

output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 0, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.
output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 0, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.
output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 1, C1 = C,     output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.
output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 1, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.
output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 1, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.

% Row constraint  at most two nonzero (non5, non0) cells per row (row5 excluded)
n_nonzero(R) :- N = #count{ C : output(R, C, Color), output(R, C, Color) != 5, Color != 0 }.
:- R != 5, N > 2.

% 4. Show result
#show output/3.

% 1. Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Output cell definition
output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Exactly one colour per output cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% 2. Copy all nonzero cells (including 5) but not zeros
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

% 3. Propagation rules (neighbourhood, 8direction)
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 0, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 0, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 1, C1 = C,     output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 1, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 1, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.

output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 0, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.
output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 0, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.
output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 1, C1 = C,     output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.
output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 1, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.
output(R1, C1, Color) :- output(R, C, Color),   R = R1 + 1, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R1, C1), input(R1, C1, 0), Color != 5.

% Row constraint  at most two nonzero (non5, non0) cells per row (row5 excluded)
n_nonzero(R, N) :- N = #count{ C : output(R, C, Color), output(R, C, Color) != 5, Color != 0 }.
row_constraint(R, N) :- n_nonzero(R, N), R != 5, N > 2.

% 4. Show result
#show output/3.

n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Output cell definition
output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Exactly one colour per output cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% 2. Copy all nonzero cells (including 5) but not zeros
output(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

% 3. Propagation rules (neighbourhood, 8direction)
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 0, C1 = C - 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
output(R, C, Color) :- output(R1, C1, Color), R1 = R + 0, C1 = C + 1, output_cell(R, C), input(R, C, 0), Color != 5.
